CPAP (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received a CPAP ventilator days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
991 CPAP_DSCHRG_CD CPAP_DSCHRG_CD O0110G3C Therapies: CPAP (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received a CPAP ventilator in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
992 INTRVNS_MDCTN_ADMSN_CD
